name: IR/Raman Phase Finder
summary: Normalize observed and reference intensities consistently for display and matching.
Add laser wavelength filtering with 532 nm as the default and 0 for all lasers.
Persist window layout, splitters, column widths and key user options.
Add drag-and-drop import for spectra and reference folders.
Reset plot view to the full experimental range across all loaded experiments; Show full also includes the current reference preview.
